title: Phymatopteris trisecta
taxonomy: Phymatopteris trisecta is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Phymatopteris, which is a group of ferns known for their unique morphology. The species Phymatopteris trisecta is further classified as a member of the family Polypodiaceae within the division Pteridophyta. This classification indicates its evolutionary relationships and characteristics distinct from other ferns. The precise classification of Phymatopteris trisecta within the kingdom Plantae reflects its position within the plant kingdom.

The plant is used to treat different health conditions, including fever and rheumatism. In some cultures, it is used as a remedy for diarrhea and other gastrointestinal issues.
